creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
After some thought I would even squeeze it little more to something like that:

# efibootmgr
Current: 0009
Timeout: 0 seconds
Order: 001A>0006>0007>000C>0008>000E>000F>000A>000B>0009>0010>0011>0012>000D>0013
  001A* FreeBSD
  0006* USB CD
  0007* USB FDD
  000C* USB HDD
  0008* ATAPI CD0
  000E* ATAPI CD1
  000F* ATAPI CD2
  000A* ATA HDD0
  000B* ATA HDD1
 +0009* ATA HDD2
  0010  Other CD
  0011* ATA HDD3
  0012* ATA HDD4
  000D* PCI LAN
  0013  Other HDD

... or like that:

# efibootmgr
Current: 0009
Timeout: 0 seconds
Order: 001A 0006 0007 000C 0008 000E 000F 000A 000B 0009 0010 0011 0012 000D 0013
  001A* FreeBSD
  0006* USB CD
  0007* USB FDD
  000C* USB HDD
  0008* ATAPI CD0
  000E* ATAPI CD1
  000F* ATAPI CD2
  000A* ATA HDD0
  000B* ATA HDD1
 +0009* ATA HDD2
  0010  Other CD
  0011* ATA HDD3
  0012* ATA HDD4
  000D* PCI LAN
  0013  Other HDD



Judge for yourself.

Regards.
